title: b9330
description: model: tag ffn_latent as MUL_MAT to fix buft probe ( #23664 ) ffn_latent_down/up are declared GGML_OP_MUL in LLM_TENSOR_INFOS but nemotron-h feeds them through ggml_mul_mat. The loader buft probe asks the backend about the declared op, so it tested an elementwise MUL on a q8_0 weight. That used to return true unconditionally and the weight stayed on GPU by luck. Once supports_op told the truth, the probe got a no and the loader pushed the weight and its matmul to CPU, splitting the graph. Taggin
